vibe: Cinematic, dramatic, expensive, premium digital catalogue, Michelin-star dining feel.

fonts.name: Playfair Display
fonts.usage: H1, H2, Hero displays, high-impact emotional statements.

fonts.name: Montserrat
fonts.usage: Section overlines, subheadings, primary CTA buttons, filter labels.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. p-8, p-12, py-24, py-32 for sections to give breathing room. Margin gap-8 to gap-16.
layout_and_spacing.marketing_grid: Tetris grid mode: Asymmetrical spans (e.g. col-span-8 and col-span-4). Never fill perfectly. Leave negative space.
layout_and_spacing.product_grid: Bento grid for categories (A5, Australian, American). Dense but luxurious.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense text and labels. Center-align hero text and big philosophical statements.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (#1A1A1A), 1px subtle border (border-[#C9A84C]/20). No heavy shadows, use faint glows or sharp edges.
surface_strategies.headers: Crystal glassmorphism: bg-[#1A1A1A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#C9A84C]/10.
surface_strategies.badges: Circular motifs as requested. Use border border-[#C9A84C] rounded-full px-4 py-1 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase.
surface_strategies.dividers: Gold divider lines: h-[1px] bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-[#C9A84C]/50 to-transparent.

buttons.primary: bg-[#8B0000] text-white hover:bg-[#A50000] uppercase tracking-widest text-sm rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-[#C9A84C] text-[#C9A84C] hover:bg-[#C9A84C] hover:text-[#1A1A1A] uppercase tracking-widest text-sm rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-colors

component_rules.inputs: bg-transparent border-b border-[#C9A84C]/30 rounded-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#C9A84C] text-white px-0 py-2
component_rules.announcement_bar: bg-[#B8860B] text-[#1A1A1A] text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-center py-2 font-bold
component_rules.badges_and_tags: Circular badge motifs for trust icons (e.g., BMS 12, Halal, Origin) using rounded-full borders.

interactive_and_motion.hover_states: Images must have slow, luxurious scale (hover:scale-105 duration-700 ease-out).
interactive_and_motion.transitions: Use fade-in on scroll for text blocks. Gentle staggers for lists.
interactive_and_motion.navigation: Header must be sticky with glassmorphism. Navigation links hover state should turn #C9A84C.

hero_wagyu.description: Cinematic wide shot of premium Wagyu steak in cast iron pan

japanese_a5_category.description: Raw Japanese A5 Wagyu beef block

australian_wagyu_category.description: Raw Australian Wagyu ribeye steak on dark wood

american_wagyu_category.description: Raw Wagyu cut on dark surface

pantry_sea_salt.description: Artisan sea salt in dark ceramic bowl

about_chef_plating.description: Dark luxury fine dining chef plating
about_chef_plating.usage: About Us / Blog Feature / Testimonial Background

media_assets.rules: Overlay hero images with max bg-black/50 or bg-gradient-to-t from-[#1A1A1A] to-transparent to ensure text contrast while keeping image visible.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='contact-to-order-btn', data-testid='category-filter-wagyu').

instructions_to_main_agent: No e-commerce cart. Replace all 'Add to Cart' functionality with a 'Contact to Order' CTA that links to WhatsApp.
Use standard Shadcn UI components for complex interactions but strip standard borders; use only 1px #C9A84C/20 borders and no default rounded corners (rounded-none for sharp luxury feel).
Strictly adhere to the dark theme #1A1A1A background with gold accents. Do not introduce standard grays or blues.
Display UAE specific info: Prices in AED. Emphasize delivery to Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, RAK, Fujairah, UAQ.
Never center-align large blocks of text. Center-alignment is only for Heros, small badges, or short philosophical quotes.
Integrate circular badge motifs across the layout for origin and BMS grading.
